# Index Entry Request Template
```
Open a PR that applies the skill inside 
`.github/skills/skill-add-idx-tags-for-index.md`  
to add index entries to the following sections in chapter X:

* section1
* section2
* section3
* section4
* section5

Notes: Do not attempt to build the pretext document in testing. 
There is no way around some of the firewall errors you will receive.
```
